changelog.v2.3.0: Removed 127 entries without JMdict data - keeping only 807 verified entries
changelog.v2.2.0: Added 20 new N5 entries from user suggestions
changelog.v2.1.0: Removed 3 non-N5 entries (大使館, 留学生, 背広)
changelog.v2.0.1: Fixed homonym matching bug - requires BOTH kanji AND kana to match
changelog.v2.0.0: Initial release with deduplication and normalization
